title: [codereview] memset in parse_packet now zeros extra 200B payload_buf - performance impact on hot path
description: parse_packet:815 does memset(info, 0, sizeof(*info)); with new payload_buf[200] this zeros 256+ bytes on every packet parse (hot path for text). Consider zeroing only needed fields or using designated initializer. P4 fixed as real work. Tag: codereview
